name: Original
description: First production prompt. Has duplicate fields listed twice. _analysis buried mid-list. Otherwise solid anatomy + disambiguation rules.

name: Clean
description: Same as v1 but with duplicate fields removed and _analysis moved first. No logic changes.

name: Literal Transcription
description: Focus on exact character-by-character transcription. Per-field confidence objects. catalog_number replaced by ranked candidates array. Adds surface_photographed, occlusion_notes, all_codes_seen. Never fills gaps from memory.
